calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joe Vickstein.
Petitioner: Maria Ayala present in pro per with the minor: Carlton Armando Elabed, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to: Armando Elabed.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-04-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Petitioner: Maria Ayala present with the Minor: Carlton Armando Elabed, was sworn and examined.
Without proper notice and consent by the minor's father (in MEXICO), the court Denied the petition withou prejudice.
The minor to file another petition on his own behalf, when reaches the age of 18 year old.
